title: sedum multicaule subsp. rugosum
intro: Sedum multicaule subsp. rugosum, also known as rough-leaved stonecrop, is a succulent plant belonging to the family Crassulaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, including eczema and wounds. Sedum multicaule subsp. rugosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
